# PlayerClassDefinition.ResourceGenerationAttribute property

The core attribute that grants this class its Resource Generation (per-class; e.g. Warlock Intelligence, Rogue Strength). `null` for a malformed record.

public CoreStat? ResourceGenerationAttribute { get; }
